member.name: M:Packages.Rider.Editor.ProjectGeneration.ProjectGeneration.SyncIfNeeded(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Syncs the scripting solution if any affected files are relevant.
member.param: A set of files whose status has changed
A set of files that got reimported
Check if project files were changed externally

member.name: M:Packages.Rider.Editor.ProjectGeneration.PackageManagerTracker.SyncIfNeeded(System.Boolean)
member.summary: If the manifest.json was changed outside Unity and Rider calls Unity to Refresh, we should call PM to Refresh its state also

member.name: M:Packages.Rider.Editor.PluginSettings.RiderPreferencesItem
member.summary: Preferences menu layout
member.remarks: Contains all 3 toggles: Enable/Disable; Debug On/Off; Writing Launch File On/Off

member.name: F:Packages.Rider.Editor.LoggingLevel.OFF
member.summary: Do not use it in logging. Only in config to disable logging.

member.name: F:Packages.Rider.Editor.LoggingLevel.FATAL
member.summary: For errors that lead to application failure

member.name: F:Packages.Rider.Editor.LoggingLevel.ERROR
member.summary: For errors that must be shown in Exception Browser

member.name: F:Packages.Rider.Editor.LoggingLevel.WARN
member.summary: Suspicious situations but not errors

member.name: F:Packages.Rider.Editor.LoggingLevel.INFO
member.summary: Regular level for important events

member.name: F:Packages.Rider.Editor.LoggingLevel.VERBOSE
member.summary: Additional info for debbuging

member.name: F:Packages.Rider.Editor.LoggingLevel.TRACE
member.summary: Methods & callstacks tracing, more than verbose

member.name: M:Packages.Rider.Editor.RiderScriptEditor.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: In 2020.x is called each time ExternalEditor is changed In 2021.x+ is called each time ExternalEditor is changed and also on each appdomain reload

member.name: T:JetBrains.Rider.Unity.Editor.RiderMenu
member.summary: Is called via commandline from Rider Notification after checking out from source control.

member.summary: Is called via commandline from Rider Notification after checking out from source control.
